body:
ClimaOceans is not yet compatible with the latest Oceananigans.
Nightly amip won't run because it uses the latest version of both packages.
This makes it not use the latest Oceananigans

See [here](https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-coarse-nightly-amip/builds/432#_)
for the nightly_amip successfully initializing on this branch.

title: Use older ClimaOceans version in nightly amip
